description: QuiverAI generates and vectorizes SVG graphics from text prompts and raster images. It also provides an app for creating, managing, and retrieving generated artwork.
summary: QuiverAI exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at `api.quiver.ai/v1` and a hosted OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://app.quiver.ai/mcp`; no first-party QuiverAI-targeted standalone CLI or GraphQL API was found.
